transcript: Speaker A: माझा हात पकड [Hold my hand] Speaker B: Hold my hand. Speaker A: लवकर कर [Hurry up] Speaker B: Hurry up. Speaker A: हळू कर [Slow down] Speaker B: Slow down. Speaker A: माझ्याकडे बघ [Look at me] Speaker B: Look at me. Speaker A: माझ्याकडे बघू नकोस [Don't look at me] Speaker B: Don't look at me. Speaker A: मला माहित नाही [I don't know] Speaker B: I don't know. बट आता I know English. कारण तुझ्याशी बोलून बोलून माझं English खूप improve झालं आहे. Thank you! [But now I know English. Because speaking with you has improved my English a lot. Thank you!] Speaker A: MySivi app वर अशाच माझ्यासोबत मराठीत बोलून English शिका. ते पण फक्त एक रुपयात. माझ्यासोबत कधीही कितीही वेळ प्रॅक्टिस करा. बोलणं, ग्रामर, सेंटेन्सेस, योग्य शब्द वापरणं, सगळं एका ठिकाणी. [Learn English by speaking with me in Marathi on the MySivi app. That too for just one rupee. Practice with me anytime, for as long as you want. Speaking, grammar, sentences, using the right words, all in one place.]
on_screen_text: माझा हात पकड / Hold my hand, लवकर कर / Hurry up, हळू कर / Slow down, माझ्याकडे बघ / Look at me, माझ्याकडे बघू नकोस / Don't look at me, मला माहित नाही / I don't know, बट आता I know English कारण तुझ्याशी बोलून बोलून माझी English खूप improve झाली आहे Thank you [But now I know English because speaking with you has improved my English a lot Thank you], MySivi app वर अशाच माझ्यासोबत मराठीत बोलून English शिका [Learn English by speaking with me in Marathi on the MySivi app], Sale Ends Today. सगळं UNLOCK करा. ३ दिवसांसाठी ₹३० ₹१ OFFER. त्यानंतर ₹२९९/महिना. कधीही Cancel करू शकता. MySivi Pro फायदे. २४/७ तुमचा Personal AI English Teacher. तुमचं grammar correct होईल instant feedback सोबत. Offer ends in 09:58. Pay using PhonePe. Start Trial at ₹1, पण फक्त एक रुपयात [But for just one rupee], माझ्यासोबत कधीही [With me anytime], कितीही वेळ प्रॅक्टिस करा [Practice for as long as you want], बोलणे ग्रामर [Speaking grammar], सेंटेन्सेस योग्य [Sentences correct], शब्द वापरणं [Using words], सगळं एका ठिकाणी [All in one place], MySivi English speaking app. Install Now
summary: The ad showcases a split-screen English learning practice session between an AI avatar and a human user. The user highlights how the MySivi app helped improve her English speaking skills. The ad promotes a 3-day trial of MySivi Pro for ₹1, prompting users to install the app.
